title: Hermes Agent + Ollama = 100% Private OS
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to build a private, local operating system using Hermes Agent and Ollama, allowing users to run AI models on their own hardware without cloud dependencies. The system integrates voice dictation, code assistance, and multi-turn conversations while keeping data entirely private.
